faqs.question: Is Talentedge Free or Paid?
faqs.answer:
Most courses on Talentedge require payment. Fees vary depending on the course duration, content, and certification offered. While there's no one-size-fits-all answer, Talentedge course fees generally range from Rs. 10,000 - 300,000. Some sources even mention a maximum price of Rs. 500,000 for certain programs. 
Here's a breakdown of what can affect the cost:
Course duration: Shorter certificate courses tend to be less expensive than longer degree programs like MBAs.
Content and delivery: Programs with more in-depth content, live sessions, or specialised certifications will likely cost more than basic courses.
Certification offered: If a course leads to a recognised industry certification, the fee might be higher.

faqs.question: What are the prerequisites for enrolling in the online degree programs offered by Talentedge?
faqs.answer:
Each online degree programme has specific prerequisites that vary depending on the field of study and level of the course. Generally, these prerequisites include:
Educational Qualifications:
A relevant undergraduate degree from a recognised university or institute.
Some advanced programs like Doctor of Business Administration by Golden Gate University require Master's Degree (or equivalent) or Bachelors Degree with certain years (usually 5+) of work experience.
Professional Experience:
Executive and business programs like an MBA, require a certain number of years of professional experience.
Technical programs may also look for practical experience in related fields.
Technical Skills:
For technical programs such as Data Science and Machine Learning, you may need a background in computer science, mathematics, or a related field.
Familiarity with programming languages or specific software.
Language Proficiency:
Proficiency in English is typically required, as most courses are conducted in English.
Some programs may require proof of language proficiency through standardized tests like TOEFL, with a score of around 6.5.
Additional Criteria:
Certain programs might have specific requirements such as prerequisite courses, minimum GPA, or entrance exams.
Letters of recommendation, a statement of purpose, or an interview might also be part of the admission process, particularly if you want to study abroad.

faqs.question: Will I get a job after completing the course from Talentedge?
faqs.answer: Talentedge offers job-oriented courses that are aimed to significantly enhance your job prospects by providing industry-relevant skills and practical learning experiences. Many courses are created in collaboration with renowned universities and institutes from across the world. They often offer job-linked programs with placement assistance, internships, and live projects, making you job-ready. However, please note that getting a job depends on your course, market conditions and your efforts.

faqs.question: What is the learning format for Talentedge courses?
faqs.answer:
Here is a detailed overview of the learning format of Talentedge
1. Live Online Classes: Live classes with interactive sessions led by industry experts and faculty from top institutions. 
2. Self-Paced Learning: Recorded sessions and course materials, allowing students to learn independently. 
3. Industry Exposure: Real-world case studies and practical projects simulating industry scenarios. 
4. Assessment & Feedback: Quizzes, assignments, and exams to track course progress. 
5. Course Delivery through LMS: Course materials, assignments, and resources available on a user-friendly Learning Management System (LMS). 
6. Certification: Earn certifications from renowned institutions after successfully completing the course.

individual_reviews.title: It provides good placement every year.

content.Placements: 70% of students were placed in this course. The highest package was approximately 3.4 LPA. There were several companies like Zinc and many companies. Approximately 70% of students got internships in several companies as a safety officer. It depends on our percentage and our experience.
content.Infrastructure: There were many types of facilities provided by college like training sessions. There were lab, Wi-Fi, and library. The classroom was very good, neat, and clean.
content.Faculty: Our teachers were very helpful. They were very supportive. They always encourage us. This course curriculum was relevant. It made the students ready for industries and companies. It depends on our study. The pass percentage was above 40 percent. Mock drills taught us how to do our job, and every teacher explained their experiences. Our director, principal, and teachers were very supportive.

individual_reviews.title: Our college placements are good.

content.Placements: In our college, almost 80-90% of students are placed. The highest salary package offered is 85 LPA and the lowest salary package offered is 70 LPA. We get regular offers from companies and also good jobs at top companies.

review_content.Infrastructure: The overall infrastructure is good, but people coming from other parts of India may have struggled with hostel food and accommodation. reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2022

review_content.Placements: Finding job after getting the degree isn't very difficult, you can easily get a job with a monthly salary at least 50K, but you are not provided jobs by the college. The students have a good encouragement for participating in extracurriculars, in the form of competitions for sports and other forms of arts, infrastructure is provided. There is strict prohibition on ragging and other activities that are deemed unparliamentary, but nonetheless, the students are allowed to enjoy while being in limits. The hostel is furnished well with a good mess, home theatre, gymnasium and halls for studying. There are facilities for laundry services that ease up our burden. Free and password protected Wi-Fi is provided to the students. The food provided at the hostel is healthy and nutritious with a bit of compromise on the taste, but it is manageable.

review_summary.college_name: Sri Balaji Vidyapeeth Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Post Graduate Diploma in ENT (Otorhinolaryngology) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Challenging and interesting life phase.

content.Placements: Packages exclusively range from 3.67 LPA to 6.73 LPA. Based on the training performances and academic grades, the pay of the placed candidates was usually decided. Internships would be arranged within the campus of the college itself, but they weren't paid. Jaypee Hospital and Columbia Asia were a few of the notable recruiters.
content.Infrastructure: There was a little lag in providing the facilitation within the time. Moreover, separate research institutes, like laboratories, were specifically designed for all the disciplines. Even sports facilities were available on the campus, and there was no adequate time to play.

individual_reviews.title: Review of Mahatma Gandhi Medical College and Research Institute.

content.Placements: Chances for being retained as a full-time employee on the campus after completion of our training period. They were paid a package of 4,50,000 per year as an average pay. Also few of the orthopaedic-based companies like Stryker and Zimmer Biomet hire us.
content.Infrastructure: I decided to do studies in this organisation based on the environment. The busiest campus where students move here for classroom, training, and libraries. College management rigorously asked the students to follow clock which means being punctual in work.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college. Its location is in a rural setup but is value for money.

content.Placements: Our college does not provide good placement opportunities to students. We have to do compulsory internships here for one year. The patient exposure is not that satisfying, but apart from that everything else is good. However, I do not know the payment and the placement facilities that they provide.
content.Infrastructure: The overall infrastructure is good, but people coming from other parts of India may have struggled with hostel food and accommodation. Other than that, everything else is good. Campus life is good. It is clean and well-maintained. The library is full of knowledgeable books and is accessible to students.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Good college and faculty members.

content.Placements: Finding job after getting the degree isn't very difficult, you can easily get a job with a monthly salary at least 50K, but you are not provided jobs by the college. Most of the students don't join any hospital after MBBS and prepare for PG course like MD or MS or some even go for civil services.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is placed in a serene environment and gives a healthy atmosphere to those dwelling within. The students have a good encouragement for participating in extracurriculars, in the form of competitions for sports and other forms of arts, infrastructure is provided. There is strict prohibition on ragging and other activities that are deemed unparliamentary, but nonetheless, the students are allowed to enjoy while being in limits. The hostel is furnished well with a good mess, home theatre, gymnasium and halls for studying. There are facilities for laundry services that ease up our burden. Free and password protected Wi-Fi is provided to the students. The food provided at the hostel is healthy and nutritious with a bit of compromise on the taste, but it is manageable.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Physicians Assistant - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely satisfied with good infrastructure and facilities of our college.

content.Placements: We have a typical campus interview. Corporate hospitals are major recruiters. Every student got the opportunity for internships on our campus arranged by the university. The role offered is physician assistant to assist physicians and consultants.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available on campus. Hostel and other basic facilities are available. Medical facilities are provided. Canteen, washrooms, drinking water, and other facilities are available. Our campus is clean and neat.
content.Faculty: Teachers are well qualified and help students. The course curriculum is very well relevant. Exams are not always very easy. We have annual exams rather than semester exams. Results are often displayed within a month of exams. Regular supplementary exams are being conducted.
